overallInterpretation: The demo shows a working agile service CLI with ticket management and sprint lifecycle commands. Artifact 1 demonstrates ticket creation, status transitions with gate enforcement (both blocking invalid transitions and blocking transitions with missing required fields), ticket listing, forward-only enforcement, backward transitions without gates, and ticket validation. Artifact 2 demonstrates sprint creation, adding tickets to a sprint, starting a sprint, sprint completion being blocked due to unmet conditions, and a velocity report command that returns no data because no sprint has been completed. The demo covers most of what was expected but the sprint lifecycle does not reach full completion -- the sprint complete command is blocked and velocity has no data to display.

artifacts.interpretation: Shows 8 CLI operations: (1) ticket creation producing task-ESE-0009, (2) gate enforcement blocking an invalid status jump from draft to readyForDev, (3) a valid transition from draft to refining, (4) gate enforcement blocking readyForDev due to 6 missing required fields, (5) ticket listing showing 4 tickets with their statuses, (6) forward enforcement blocking buildingDemo to done (must go through validatingDemo), (7) a backward transition from refining to draft succeeding without gates, and (8) ticket validation passing for all 4 tickets.

Shows 5 sprint operations: (1) creating a sprint named demo_sprint, (2) adding task-ESE-0009 to the sprint, (3) starting the sprint with 1 ticket and 0 story points, (4) sprint completion blocked because task-ESE-0009 has not been demo-accepted, and (5) a velocity report that returns no data because no sprint has been completed yet.
